zh.lifeSummary: 當Otes L' Arcedekne於大約1256年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Thomas L' Arcedekne33歲，母親Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth27歲。他於大約1274年與Amice of Saltash在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年12月在他的家鄉享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Otes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a patronymic derived from the genitive case of the medieval given name Ote or Ode (of Norman, and ultimately Germanic, origin; compare Odette ). In northern England the medieval given name survived into the 19th century. It came to be used as a given name in America in honour of the Revolutionary hero James Otis ( 1725–83 ); in modern times it has been bestowed in honour of the American soul singer Otis Redding ( 1941–67 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Otes L' Arcedekne was born about 1256, in Cornwall, England, his father, Thomas L' Arcedekne, was 33 and his mother, Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, was 27. He married Amice of Saltash about 1274, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in December 1289, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otes L' Arcedekne est né environ 1256, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Thomas L' Arcedekne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Amice of Saltash environ 1274, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en décembre 1289, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otes L' Arcedekne um 1256 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas L' Arcedekne 33 und seine Mutter Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth 27. Er hat um 1274 in Cornwall, England Amice of Saltash geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Dezember 1289 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otes L' Arcedekne è nato il circa 1256 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Thomas L' Arcedekne, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Amice of Saltash circa 1274, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel dicembre 1289, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Otes L' Arcedekneが約1256年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Thomas L' Arcedekneは33歳，母Alice FitzRoger de Warkworthは27歳であった。約1274年にイギリスコルンワルでAmice of Saltashと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年12月に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otes L' Arcedekne(이)가 대략 1256년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas L' Arcedekne(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1274년 영국 코른월에서 Amice of Saltash(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 12월 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otes L' Arcedekne nasceu aproximadamente 1256, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas L' Arcedekne, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Amice of Saltash aproximadamente 1274, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1289, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otes L' Arcedekne родился около 1256 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas L' Arcedekne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzRoger de Warkworth, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Amice of Saltash около 1274 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер декабрь 1289 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.
